description: Blue-and-white colored-pencil magazine column illustration with gentle rounded forms, airy margins, and soft editorial warmth.

visual_dna.background: clean white magazine-column space with soft blue framing accents and no texture
visual_dna.line_art: gentle blue-gray colored-pencil line, lightly uneven, with soft hand-filled blue shading
visual_dna.metaphor_logic: friendly editorial metaphors using desks, tiny task stations, paper flows, inboxes, soft machines, rails, folders, and small helper agents
visual_dna.composition: airy magazine column illustration with one clear conceptual scene, generous white margins, and calm blue-white balance
visual_dna.character_treatment: an original soft round helper character performs the core task with warm but focused energy
visual_dna.accent_colors: mostly blue and white, with tiny pale yellow highlights only for attention; avoid red except for very small warning marks

style_block: Use a blue-and-white colored-pencil magazine column illustration style.
Keep a clean white background with airy margins, soft blue framing accents, and gentle blue-gray pencil lines.
Use soft hand-filled blue shading and rounded friendly shapes; avoid hard vector edges.
Build one clear editorial metaphor using desks, paper flows, inboxes, rails, folders, soft machines, or small helper agents.
The character must perform the core task inside the scene, with gentle focus and not as a decorative mascot.
Make the image feel like a warm magazine column spot illustration: calm, readable, lightly whimsical, and not childish.
Use mostly blue and white; add tiny pale yellow highlights only where attention is needed.
prompt_rules.placeholder_policy: Use blank blue-white plaques, empty paper tabs, blank inbox labels, or unlabeled callout cards for deterministic overlay.
